description: Machine-enforced done-condition verification in the workplan executor, plus a hex ci command and deployed GitHub Actions workflow that close the workplan drift gap

specs.description: WorkplanTask with done_command deserializes from JSON
specs.given: A workplan JSON step with done_command: 'hex stdb --help | grep -q query'
specs.when: The workplan is loaded by the executor
specs.then: done_command is available as Some(String) on the WorkplanTask struct

specs.description: WorkplanTask without done_command deserializes without error
specs.given: A workplan JSON step with no done_command field
specs.when: The workplan is loaded by the executor
specs.then: done_command is None; step executes normally with no verification attempt

specs.given: A workplan step with done_command that exits 0 after the agent finishes
specs.when: The workplan executor finishes running the agent for that step
specs.then: Step status is set to completed; gate_results records the done_command exit 0

specs.description: Failing done_command marks step failed with clear message
specs.given: A workplan step with done_command that exits 1 after the agent finishes
specs.then: Step status is set to failed; error message includes the done_condition text and the exit code; executor halts the phase

specs.description: hex ci exits 0 on a clean workspace
specs.given: All 4 gates pass: no architecture violations, no ADR rule violations, all done_commands exit 0, all steps reference spec IDs
specs.then: Prints a gate-by-gate summary with check marks and exits 0

specs.description: hex ci exits 1 and names the failing done_command
specs.given: A workplan step has done_command that exits non-zero
specs.when: hex ci runs the workplan gate sweep
specs.then: Prints the workplan name, step ID, done_condition text, and exit code; exits 1

specs.description: hex ci exits 1 on architecture violations
specs.given: hex analyze returns violations (e.g. an adapter importing another adapter)
specs.when: hex ci runs the architecture gate
specs.then: Prints the violation list and exits 1; remaining gates still run and report

specs.description: hex ci exits 1 when a step has no spec references
specs.given: A workplan step with an empty specs array
specs.when: hex ci runs the spec coverage gate
specs.then: Prints the step ID and workplan name; exits 1

specs.description: hex-ci.yml is embedded in the hex-cli binary
specs.given: hex-cli is built with the CI template in assets/ci/hex-ci.yml
specs.when: The binary is inspected for embedded assets
specs.then: The CI workflow template is accessible via the Assets struct

specs.description: CI workflow calls hex ci as its single enforcement gate
specs.given: A project initialized with hex that has .github/workflows/hex-ci.yml deployed
specs.when: A push triggers the CI workflow
specs.then: The workflow runs hex ci and fails the build if hex ci exits non-zero
